title: Labasa Heat Wave
lead: Labasa is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.00. The city's temperature has reached extreme levels, scoring 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Labasa has resulted in a significant rise in Cooling Degree Days (CDD) with a value of 9.5 GG, indicating extremely hot conditions. 
 The humidity level is at 76%, which is relatively high, and the wind speed is 6.8 km/h, providing little relief from the heat. 
 The city's conditions are critical, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) and high CDD, making it essential to take necessary precautions to stay safe.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately to ensure public safety.
